mano_cua.result_summary: triple-click只选中当前单词而非整段落，void元素（[editable button]内联按钮）不在选区内。3次不同位置的triple-click测试结果一致：选区始终停留在单词边界，无法扩展到整段包含void元素
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The [editable button] void element is never included in the selection when triple-clicking. The selection stops at the single word boundary, never extending to cover the paragraph's void elements. Triple-click behavior is limited to word-level selection instead of block/paragraph-level selection, which fails to include inline void elements.
